race.comment: SPIRITUALISTIC (3) has won two of her last three starts and stretches out to the 1600m today. Ploughed through the heavy going to salute over 1400m at this track as fav from the good draw. Tricky gate today and expected to run the trip. SOUL LADY (2) continued her consistent form when fourth last start at Wagga. She draws for a soft run. BRANNUM (5) nailed late when second two-back at Hawkesbury over this trip. Reared at the start at latest and settled last before making ground to run eighth over 1500m at Kembla Grange. Finds a winnable race and can get over from the draw. Each way. STAR BLING (7) rewarded for her consistency with a dominant win over 1605m at the Sapphire Coast in BM58 grade. Doesn't get the same map favours here but sure to be thereabouts.
